description: Evaluate the integration of micro-mobility vehicles into the Bologna Pasubio corridor using the baseline scenario files located at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/. Define a custom e-scooter vehicle type (id: escooter, vClass: bicycle, maxSpeed: 5.56, width: 0.6, length: 1.5, guiShape: scooter) and save it to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/escooter.add.xml. Generate demand for approximately 150 e-scooter trips over a 3600-second period, ensuring they are routed for the bicycle vehicle class, and save the output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/escooter_demand.rou.xml. Create a SUMO configuration file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/mixed_mobility.sumocfg that integrates the baseline network and routes with the new e-scooter definitions and demand. Configure the simulation to record trip information to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos.xml and collision data to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/collisions.xml. After running the simulation, calculate the average trip duration for escooter vehicles compared to all other standard vehicles and save the results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/micromobility_report.txt.
